title: coleus dewildemanianus
intro: Coleus dewildemanianus, also known as Painted Leaf or Dewildeman's Coleus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Coleus dewildemanianus include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Coleus dewildemanianus can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by extracting its essential oils through steam distillation.
